task_completion.description: Verify that the three survey groups ('Annual Tech Summit 2024', 'Global Healthcare Innovation Forum 2024', 'Women in Leadership Conference 2024') were created with their correct sort orders.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the LimeSurvey 'Survey groups' list showing the three specified groups. Check that their sort orders are 2, 1, and 3 respectively.

task_completion.description: Verify that the survey 'Post-Event Satisfaction Survey - Tech Summit 2024' was created inside the 'Annual Tech Summit 2024' group and is set to anonymized.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey settings or overview page showing the title 'Post-Event Satisfaction Survey - Tech Summit 2024', the Survey Group set to 'Annual Tech Summit 2024', and the 'Anonymized responses' setting toggled to 'On' or 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a question group named 'Overall Event Experience' was added to the survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey structure menu or question group list showing a group titled 'Overall Event Experience'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a List (Radio) question with code 'Q01' and the correct text was created inside the 'Overall Event Experience' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the question editor or summary showing Code: 'Q01', Type: 'List (Radio)' (or 'L'), and the text 'How would you rate your overall experience at the Tech Summit 2024?'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the five specific answer options were added to question Q01.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Edit answer options' screen for Q01 showing five rows with codes 1 to 5 mapped to 'Very Dissatisfied', 'Dissatisfied', 'Neutral', 'Satisfied', and 'Very Satisfied'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent interacted with the actual LimeSurvey web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard LimeSurvey UI elements, menus, and branding in the browser window, rather than a text editor or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use terminal commands or direct database modifications to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating through the LimeSurvey admin panel, not a terminal window executing curl commands or SQL queries.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the completion of the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are not open and being used to inject the expected text into the DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Survey Groups: 'Annual Tech Summit 2024' (Sort order: 2), 'Global Healthcare Innovation Forum 2024' (Sort order: 1), 'Women in Leadership Conference 2024' (Sort order: 3). Target Survey Title: 'Post-Event Satisfaction Survey - Tech Summit 2024'. Target Survey Group: 'Annual Tech Summit 2024'. Expected Question Code: 'Q01'. Expected Question Type: 'L' (which is the legacy character code for List (Radio) in LimeSurvey).
